/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/3DEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3DEngine.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3DEngine.dir/src/ObjMesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3DEngine.dir/src/MeshLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3DEngine.dir/src/Object.cpp.o -o 3DEngine  libglad.a -lglfw -lstb /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
